noticia.titulo: Sacrament of Sacrifice: Obsessive Devotion in Bethany C. Morrow’s The Body
noticia.texto_resumido: Maya Gittelman looks at religious trauma in the new horror novel from Bethany C. Morrow. The post Sacrament of Sacrifice: Obsessive Devotion in Bethany C. Morrow’s The Body appeared first on Reactor .
